blockingIssues.description: tests/test_concurrent_caching.py barrier proof can still pass under sequential execution because build_canonical_lead_dataset swallows scraper exceptions in _scrape_county; BrokenBarrierError does not reliably propagate, so the assertion is not a deterministic sequential-vs-concurrent proof.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify RED→GREEN policy for verification/backfill features: either require an explicit initial failing run, or define acceptable alternative evidence when behavior is already correct and no red state is expected.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Shared-state observations from fix-concurrent-caching-edge-cases and fix-cross-pipeline-graceful-degradation both flagged mismatch between required RED→GREEN proof and transcript behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit validator-command rule: do not pipe test/typecheck/lint commands through tail/head/grep during recorded verification because pipes can mask non-zero exits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-retry-transient-scope review observed a piped unittest command in transcript (`... | tail -40`) while command-level reporting still showed exitCode 0.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a milestone-governance check that feature expectedBehavior and validation-contract assertions stay synchronized when fixes change validation semantics (for example, timing-based vs deterministic concurrency evidence).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-concurrency-proof-flake review noted mismatch between feature requirement (non-timing proof) and validation-contract VAL-INFRA-006 wording that still references timed threshold evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require an explicit handoff audit that reported commitId matches the actual diff containing the implemented change before marking success.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-cross-pipeline-graceful-degradation review found handoff commitId pointing to a dashboard fixture commit while the graceful-degradation test fix existed in a different working-tree diff.

orchestratorOverrides.lintFailure: Known pre-existing repository issue documented in mission AGENTS.md (eslint binary/config absent). Treated as non-blocking validator noise for scrutiny synthesis.
